page.content: The table presents poverty indicators and equivalised income statistics from 2008 to 2011. Under the header "% At risk of poverty," the values for 2008 are 12.4% (Survey) and 15.2% (Reg.), for 2009 are 12.0% (Survey) and 14.5% (Reg.), for 2010 are 12.1% (Survey) and 14.7% (Reg.), and for 2011 are 12.6% (Survey) and 14.5% (Reg.). The "Poverty threshold, €" shows values of 11,406 (2008), 11,648 (2009), 11,931 (2010), 12,281 (2011), 12,371 (2010), 12,635 (2011), 12,791 (2010), and 12,878 (2011). In the "Poverty gap, %," the figures are 15.3% (2008), 19.9% (2009), 16.9% (2010), 19.2% (2011), 17.2% (2010), 21.8% (2011), 19% (2010), and 19.1% (2011).
